top_signals.title: Shipping stalls in Strait of Hormuz after Iran declares key waterway closed again - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Shipping stalls in Strait of Hormuz after Iran declares key waterway closed again  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tesla faces federal probe after Model 3 slams into Texas home, killing 76-year-old
top_signals.summary: Harris County authorities said that the driver, Michael Butler, said that he had been using Tesla's partially automated driving systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: What today’s central bankers can learn from the late Alan Greenspan
top_signals.summary: Former chair of the Fed Alan Greenspan has died today, leaving a great legacy and many lessons for policy makers today, says Ben Ramanauskas Alan Greenspan, Chairman of the Federal Reserve for nearly two decades, died yesterday at the age of 100. While his passing will receive little media coverage due to the resignation of [...]

top_signals.title: Japan commemorates victims of discriminatory leprosy policy
top_signals.summary: A ceremony was held in Tokyo to restore the honor of leprosy patients in Japan, who had suffered severe discrimination based on a policy of forced isolation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
top_signals.summary: Will Cathcart will step down as the head of WhatsApp and move into another role at the company. Kunal Shah will take over.
